disclaimer: Ranges are Nash/GTO approximations for study purposes. Verify with professional solvers (GTO Wizard, PioSolver) for critical decisions.

position_notes.UTG: Under the Gun เนโฌโ€ earliest position, tightest range
position_notes.MP: Middle Position เนโฌโ€ tight but wider than UTG
position_notes.LJ: Lojack เนโฌโ€ one off hijack, moderate opening
position_notes.HJ: Hijack เนโฌโ€ two off button, opens wider
position_notes.CO: Cutoff เนโฌโ€ just before button, wide opens
position_notes.BTN: Button เนโฌโ€ widest opens, best position postflop
position_notes.SB: Small Blind เนโฌโ€ first to act postflop, aggressive pre
position_notes.BB: Big Blind เนโฌโ€ defends wide vs late position opens

5BB_BTN_RFI.notes: BTN shoves any pair, any ace, wide suited connectors ~52%

5BB_SB_RFI.notes: SB vs BB shoves ~48%, slightly tighter than BTN

10BB_BB_vs_shove_btn.notes: BB 10BB vs BTN 45% shove: call ~36% (all aces, broad SC)

10BB_BB_vs_shove_sb.notes: BB 10BB vs SB 48% shove: call ~41% (all aces + Kx suited)

5BB_BB_vs_shove_btn.notes: BB 5BB vs BTN 50%+ shove: call ~58% (huge pot odds)

100BB_BTN_vs_3bet.notes: BTN 100BB vs 3bet: pure 4bet KK+/AK, wide flat Broadways+SC, edges mixed

100BB_CO_vs_3bet.notes: CO 100BB vs 3bet: 4bet KK+/AKs, call Broadways + middle pairs, edges mixed

40BB_BTN_vs_3bet.notes: BTN 40BB vs 3bet: shove TT+/AQs+/AKo, no flat

60BB_BTN_vs_3bet.notes: BTN 60BB vs 3bet: 4bet commits JJ+/AK, call TT-77 + premium suited

100BB_BB_vs_raise_btn.notes: BB 100BB vs BTN open: pure 3bet JJ+/AKs, call wide Broadways + pairs, edge hands mixed

100BB_BB_vs_raise_co.notes: BB 100BB vs CO open: ~20% tighter than vs BTN, fewer edge mixes

100BB_BB_vs_raise_sb.notes: BB 100BB vs SB open: defend wide, more mix edges (SB opens ~45%)

20BB_BB_vs_raise_btn.notes: BB 20BB vs BTN open: pure 3bet most premiums, AA/QQ mix (sometimes trap-call)

40BB_BB_vs_raise_btn.notes: 40BB BB vs BTN เนโฌโ€ aggressive 3bet (often as shove), call broadways
